productName: Legacy Truffles - DOH Compliant - Triple Truffle Blunts - .5g Pack - Grape Velvet - 1g
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Grape Velvet and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — a sweet, candy-like grape flavor, with a versatile, anytime balance. A little goes a long way.
